source: International Standard Bible Encyclopaedia (James Orr ed., 1915)
html:
ar-si-fu'-rith (Arsiphourith; the King James Version Azephurith): 112 of the sons of Arsiphurith returned to Jerusalem with Zerubbabel (1 Esdras 5:16). The name is omitted in Ezra and Nehemiah, but the number corresponds to those mentioned with Jorah (Ezr 2:18) and Hariph (Ne 7:24).
